//   - Parameter table: [cols="1,2,5"] with Direction / Parameter / Description
//   - Compiled example in examples/generators/ via include::example$
//   - Expected output in .... literal block (not ----)
//   - Signature formatting: same rules as algorithm/graph_class templates
//   - No See Also section (sidebar nav is sufficient)
//
// ============================================================================

[#sec:generator-name]
= Generator Name (General Concept)

One-line summary of what kind of graph this generates.

*Defined in:* `<boost/graph/header.hpp>`

== Synopsis

[source,cpp]
----
template <typename RandomGenerator, typename Graph>
class generator_iterator;

generator_iterator(RandomGenerator& gen, vertices_size_type n, ...);
----

Description of the model: what graph structure it produces, what the
parameters control, when to use it.

== Parameters

[cols="1,2,5"]
|===
| Direction | Parameter | Description

| IN | `RandomGenerator& gen` | A random number generator.
| IN | `vertices_size_type n` | Number of vertices.
| ... | ... | ...
|===

// If the generator has variants (sorted, unique, etc.), add them as
// === subsections with their own synopsis and brief description.
// Only document parameters that differ from the main class.

== Example

[source,cpp]
----
include::example$generators/generator_name.cpp[]
----

Expected output:

....
...
....
